title: Organization
description: An organizational unit as exposed by the VU Amsterdam Pure REST web service (Pure API v5.34.3).

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object; prefer the UUID when present.

uuid.description: UUID, the primary identity of the entity.

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification.

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification.

portalUrl.description: URL of the unit on the Pure Portal.

name.description: Localized name of the organizational unit.

type.description: Classification reference for the organization type (faculty, department, etc.).

lifecycle.description: Active period (start/end) of the organizational unit.

identifiers.description: External identifiers related to the organization.
